name: io.github.quadratik-ai/quadratik
title: Quadratik
description: Search and manage 220M+ B2B contacts. Filter by title, industry, location, and more.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Your Quadratik API key. Get one at https://quadratik.com → Account Settings → API Keys. Optional for searching (results will have masked emails/phones), required for saving, exporting, and list management.
